chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 5540 of 2014 Date Order with Signature of Judge(s) Priority 1. For order on office objection 2. For hearing of CMA No.30106/2024 3. For hearing of main case 23-04-2025 None present for the petitioners Mr. Wasim Iqbal, advocate for the respondent Ms. Summiya Kalwar, advocate for respondent Mr. Sandeep Malani, Assistant Advocate General This petition is pending since 2014 without any progress. Eleven years later and on the last date learned counsel sought adjournment who was given a fixed date. Today once again petitioner remains unrepresented without any intimation or justification. Petition is dismissed for non- prosecution. Judge Judge Ayaz Gul
